case_title: SIMMRIN, LILLIAN vs. CONNELL, ESRA, BRIAN et al

CORRESPONDENCE REC'D FROM DECT

MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM WAIVER OF JURY TRIAL, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT CONNELL, ESRA, BRIAN HEARING SET FOR MAR-25-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 220
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 220, MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM WAIVER OF JURY TRIAL, CALENDAR OF MAR-25-1998, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER NO APPEARANCE BY PLTF, DEFT'S COUNSEL TO GIVE NOTICE.
JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO APR-29-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 608 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL

ROOM 608 VJ GEORGE NELSON, C.O'LEARY, CSR, GGOROSIN, CLERK JURY TRIAL CONT'D, ALL PARTIES, COUNSEL, EXCEPT PLTF. PRESENT. ALL JURORS PRESENT. JURY RETIRED TO DELIBERATE ON ITS VERDICT. JURY RETURNED TO COURT, HAS REACHED A VERDICT FOR THE DEFT AND AGAINST PLTF. VERDICT READ INTO THE RECORD BY COURT. JURY POLLED AT PLTF'S REQUEST, VERDICT WAS 11 YES 1 NO. JURY DISCHARGED, THANKED AND EXCUSED AND PER ORDER OF JUDGE NELSON, REMAINDER OF JURY SERVICE EXCUSED. EXHIBITS W/DRAWN AND RETURNED TO RESPECTIVE COUNSEL PER COURT'S ORDER DEFT TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $78.00 FOR TRANSACTION 2406P1030000 (JURY FEES), PAYABLE TO S.F.SUPERIOR COURT, WARRANT #00059451, DATED MAY-01-1998

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CONNELL, ESRA, BRIAN ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $1,214.97 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,214.97, DEFENDANT TO RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF COSTS OF SUIT AS PER MEMORANDUM OF COSTS.

CLOSING ARGUMENTS. COURT INTRUCTS JURY ON THE LAW OF THE CASE. TRIAL CONT'D TOMORROW, 4/30/98 AT 9AM FOR JURY DELIBERATION, JURY ADMONISHED.
